introSection: Correcaminos Bip, Bip (English: Road Runner Beep, Beep) is a Mack Rides roller coaster located at Parque Warner Madrid in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain. The ride is based on the cartoon characters Wile E. Coyote and the Road Runner, and opened in 2009.
fullText: Correcaminos Bip, Bip (English: Road Runner Beep, Beep) is a Mack Rides roller coaster located at Parque Warner Madrid in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain. The ride is based on the cartoon characters Wile E. Coyote and the Road Runner, and opened in 2009.
